title: SCHOOL SUPPLIES DONATIONS - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY KROC SOCIAL SERVICES MARION COUNTY SCHOOL SUPPLIES DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts basic school supplies such as pencils, paper, art supplies, binders, backpacks, or monetary donations. Offers an option to sponsor a child. 1977 Front Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm (503) 585-6688 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 585-6688 Family Services INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: 1/2 mile north of Market Street on the west side of Front Street. Cherriots bus routes 9,19 Services: School Supplies Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT PAYMENT ASSISTANCE UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
